source: KWSP/EPF annual dividend declarations 2015-2025 (kwsp.gov.my dividend resource centre; cross-checked against EPF media releases and StashAway/RinggitPlus historical tables). Simpanan Shariah launched 2016, first dividend year 2017.
notes: Per-year EPF declared dividend rates (%). conventional_pct = Simpanan Konvensional; shariah_pct = Simpanan Shariah (null before 2017 — the scheme did not exist). These are historical declared rates, not a forecast; EPF declares each year's dividend annually and rates vary year to year.
